clinical_technical_rationale: Current champion reference with minimal extension for psychologist.
Adds burden composites for ranking quality.
Compact clinically grounded engineered feature space.
Adds cross-domain context burdens without target leaks.
Union set to maximize recoverable signal before ceiling decision.
Prioritizes impact and impairment signals.
Adds explicit coverage and missingness regime.
Prunes broad proxies; focuses on elimination core and impact.
Adds source mix / agreement semantics.
Introduces enuresis/encopresis-aware representation.
